name: Suzhou Shihua New Material Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Shihua New Material Technology Co., Ltd. designs, develops, and manufactures functional materials in China. It offers precision process materials, such as acrylic and silicone tapes; multiple function materials, including general bonding, ultra thin, embossed, thermal conductive, electrical conductive, removable, chemical resistance, shock absorption, and flame retardant tapes; and display module materials. The company's products are used in the consumer electronics, smart wearable devices, new energy vehicles, medical electronics, and other fields. Suzhou Shihua New Material Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 2010 and is based in Suzhou, China.
